patient_summary: Olivia is a 73-year-old female. Key active problems documented include Mixed dyslipidemia, Essential hypertension (benign), Postoperative anemia / Unspecified anemia, Leg pain, and Hyperlipidemia associated with type 2 diabetes mellitus. A colonoscopy with biopsy is scheduled for 02/21/2025. Notable laboratory abnormalities (07/03/2023) include Ferritin 266.8 (H) ng/mL, Iron 41 (L) ug/dL, Iron Saturation 15 (L) %, Chloride 108 (H) mmol/L, Anion Gap 5.0 (L) mmol/L, eGFR CKD-EPI 58 (L) ml/min/1.73m2, Triglycerides 158 (H) mg/dL, and VLDL 32 (H) mg/dL. PHQ assessments recorded include PHQ-9 total score 0 (03/28/2023) and PHQ-9 score 3 (11/17/2020). Multiple social history and demographic conflicts exist in the record (smoking history, legal sex, DOB) that require reconciliation.
